name: Selection & Configuration
description: How product variants and configuration options should be presented for clear, error-free selection

heuristics.principle: Variant selection such as size, colour or configuration should be clear and unambiguous
checkpoints: All available options are clearly visible
Option labels are descriptive (not just codes)
Visual swatches match actual product appearance

heuristics.principle: Unavailable options should be clearly labelled and not selectable
checkpoints: Out of stock variants are visually distinct
Unavailable options cannot be accidentally selected
Stock status is communicated for each variant
Back-in-stock notifications are offered where appropriate

heuristics.principle: The impact of selections on price, availability or delivery should be immediately visible
checkpoints: Price updates when variant is selected
Delivery estimate changes are shown if applicable
No surprises after adding to cart from variant selection
